commands.name: targeted-installer-regressions
commands.command: pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap exec tsx --test --test-name-pattern "delegates install requests through the CLI wrapper|releases stdin after ENTER closes the final summary|waitForEnter resolves|does not render the same final screen twice" src/cli.test.ts src/install.test.ts src/install.runtime.test.ts && pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap exec tsx --test --test-name-pattern "refreshes the pairing code automatically|reuses an already paired existing host|renders an honest manual fallback|semantically dedupes repeated setup next steps|removes contradictory start commands" src/install.runtime.test.ts

notes: Manual-fallback finalization now replaces bootstrap placeholder pairing items with truthful fallback messaging.
The shared TUI keypress loop now resumes stdin on entry and pauses stdin on exit so the final summary does not leave the process waiting on input.
The CLI layer now has a dedicated install-wrapper regression so proof does not rely only on code inspection for `executeHappyTG`.
